channel.title: Imap on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Imap on Arrans github.io

item.title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
item.description: All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-desktop
item.description: Decentralized private messenger with chat-shared tools and games for Desktop

item.title: rustmailer/bichon
item.description: Bichon – A lightweight, high-performance Rust email archiver with WebUI

item.title: kurrier-org/kurrier
item.description: Kurrier is a modern, self-hosted workspace for email, calendar, contacts and storage.

item.title: emersion/go-imap
item.description: 📥 An IMAP library for Go clients and servers

item.title: OfflineIMAP/offlineimap
item.description: Read/sync your IMAP mailboxes (python2) [LEGACY: move to offlineimap3]

item.title: ProtonMail/gluon
item.description: An IMAP server library written in Go
